response.overview: Travelogue: Reel 1: Map of Alaska, showing Glacier Bay and Katmai National Monuments. Kodiak Island and Mt. McKinley National Park. Views of snow covered mountains, coastline, forests and rivers; includes scenes of glaciers, with ice falling into the sea; and aerial shots of Kodiak Island. Reel 2: More views of rivers and mountains, including Mt. McKinley; aerial views of coast line, volcano crater, barren mountains, and sunset.
response.title: Alaska
